{{Quote|Greetings, soldier! If you have any skill in space mining, I could use your assistance. We need to quickly finish the base for the inevitable conflict here and need raw materials. Specifically we need obsidian ore from the Kessel system. That something you can help with?|Lieutenant Romer to a Rebel|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Romer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Romer was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
